title: PowerShell: Suspicious Command Execution (Real Windows Security Events)
description: Detects suspicious PowerShell commands in Windows Security Event 4688 process creation logs. Covers download cradles, encoded execution, AMSI bypass, credential access, and common attack framework commands. Optimized for real Windows Security Events (not Sysmon) using Original Log Content matching.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and ('Event ID' = '4688') and ( (('Command Line' like '*invoke-webrequest*' or 'Command Line' like '*downloadstring*' or 'Command Line' like '*downloadfile*' or 'Command Line' like '*iwr *' or 'Command Line' like '*wget *' or 'Command Line' like '*curl *' or 'Command Line' like '*net.webclient*' or 'Command Line' like '*start-bitstransfer*')) or (('Command Line' like '*-enc*' or 'Command Line' like '*-encodedcommand*' or 'Command Line' like '*frombase64string*' or 'Command Line' like '*tobase64string*')) or (('Command Line' like '*amsiutils*' or 'Command Line' like '*amsiinitfailed*' or 'Command Line' like '*reflection.assembly*' or 'Command Line' like '*setvalue($null,$true)*')) or (('Command Line' like '*get-credential*' or 'Command Line' like '*mimikatz*' or 'Command Line' like '*sekurlsa*' or 'Command Line' like '*lsadump*' or 'Command Line' like '*invoke-mimikatz*' or 'Command Line' like '*get-gpppassword*' or 'Command Line' like '*find-localadminaccess*')) or (('Command Line' like '*get-domainuser*' or 'Command Line' like '*get-domaingroup*' or 'Command Line' like '*get-domaincomputer*' or 'Command Line' like '*get-netuser*' or 'Command Line' like '*get-netgroup*' or 'Command Line' like '*get-netcomputer*' or 'Command Line' like '*invoke-sharefinder*' or 'Command Line' like '*invoke-kerberoast*' or 'Command Line' like '*invoke-bloodhound*')) ) | stats count as Detections by 'Command Line' | sort -Detections
falsepositives: IT automation scripts using encoded PowerShell
Security tools performing legitimate AD queries
